name: Hide In Dummy
short_description: "Hide in Dummy" is a multiplayer game where players hide among dummies or become the seeker. The seeker changes every 30 seconds, and the last player standing wins. Dummies spawn when players are caught, creating chaos. Use strategy to survive or outwit the seeker.
detailed_description:
"Hide in Dummy" is an intense multiplayer game where you either hide among dummies to survive or become the seeker to track down real players.

Psychological Warfare with Dummies
In a space filled with both dummy AIs and real players, can you perfectly hide? The seeker must use sharp deduction and keen observation to find the players.

Changing Seekers, Last One Standing Wins!
Every 30 seconds, the seeker changes randomly, and the last player standing wins. But be careful – you might become the seeker at any moment!

Chaos-Inducing Dummy Creation System
Every time a player is caught by the seeker, a dummy character spawns in a random location, making the game even more unpredictable. Confuse your opponents and survive until the end!
